summary_line: Westwood NJ-headquartered, employee-owned fee-only fiduciary RIA — founded 1983, $17.5B AUM, 238 employees, 106 advisors, 6,300+ clients, 0 DRPs. The largest NJ-headquartered RIA in this batch and the **geographic peer most relevant to USWM in Chatham**. Long history of strategic growth (timeline page shows expansion years from 1983 through 2024). Hero: 'Nothing makes us happier than helping you live well.' Employee-ownership is the defining structural differentiator vs. PE-backed peers like Mather Group ($13.4B) and Mercer Advisors.

notable_events.event: ADV snapshot via IAPD CRD 155649 — 238 employees, 106 advisors, $17,678,214,162 regulatory AUM, 0 DRPs. Legal name: 'MODERA WEALTH MANAGEMENT, LLC.' Established 1983 per /our-story.

Site capture: 5 pages (home, about/our-story, blog, contact, services). Hero: 'Nothing makes us happier than helping you live well.' Homepage stats: $17.5B AUM / 11.2 (likely avg client retention years) / 6,300+ clients. Tagline: 'Simplify your financial life with Modera Wealth Management—personalized, fee-only advice that helps you gain clarity, confidence, and peace of mind.' Two pillars: Financial Planning · Investment Management. 'Our Story' page emphasizes 1983 founding + 'history of strategic growth' timeline with major expansion years 1983, 1995, 2011, 2013-2016+. Company-values copy: 'We are proactive, positive problem solvers... foster a culture of excellence and encourage diverse perspectives... deliver sophisticated, fee-only wealth management in a highly personal way... relentless commitment to a client-first, fiduciary approach.' Employee-owned structure is the defining ownership differentiator vs. PE-backed peers.
